meta_title: For Founders: deployment workflow to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to deployment workflow and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Deployment Workflow to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about your empty portfolio. Learn a professional deployment workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your MVP and gain traction.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, you must prioritize shipping over perfection. Implement a rapid deployment workflow using Antigravity for instant infrastructure and Claude Code for iterative development. By automating your pipeline, you transform raw ideas into live, revenue-generating SaaS products that serve as undeniable proof of your technical expertise.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio is the silent killer of entrepreneurial momentum. You possess the vision and the drive, yet without a live product to show, potential users and investors remain skeptical. It is a classic Catch-22: you need a portfolio to prove your capability, but you need a product to build the portfolio.

We are breaking that cycle today. By treating deployment not as a final hurdle, but as a continuous, automated heartbeat of your development process, you shift from being a 'learner' to a 'shipper.' This guide utilizes Antigravity and Claude Code to turn your development environment into a high-velocity production factory, ensuring your MVP is live, secure, and ready for market before the competition even finishes their README files.

steps.title: Define the Lean MVP Scope
steps.description: Before touching code, narrow your focus to one core problem. A single, functioning feature is worth more than ten half-baked modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Define a 3-day MVP scope for a [SaaS Concept] that solves a burning problem for [Target Audience] with minimal technical debt.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Create a project roadmap for a 3-day MVP focused on user auth and core value delivery.'

steps.title: Initialize Infrastructure with Antigravity
steps.description: Stop configuring servers manually. Antigravity automates your cloud architecture, provisioning production-ready environments in seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provision a secure, scalable production environment for a web app. Include auto-scaling, SSL, and a managed database connection.

steps.title: Build Core Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold your business logic. It understands your codebase context and writes production-grade code that adheres to industry standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular API endpoint for [Feature] following RESTful best practices and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the user signup flow using the existing database schema.'

steps.title: Automate the Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Connect your repository to your deployment environment. Every push should trigger a test suite and a deployment to your staging environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a CI/CD pipeline that runs unit tests and deploys to production only if build passes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file=ci-config.yaml 'Add a deployment trigger that runs tests before pushing to production.'

steps.title: Ship and Validate
steps.description: The final step is getting the URL into the hands of users. Your portfolio is now a live application, not a static list of links.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a summary of the deployed infrastructure and the live production URL for the README.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Draft a launch announcement for the MVP and update the README with the live site link.'

pro_tips: Treat your commit messages as a public changelog; it showcases your work ethic to future clients or employers.
Never deploy on a Friday afternoon; always leave 24 hours to monitor for critical bugs.
Use feature flags to decouple deployment from release, allowing you to ship broken features safely in production.
Prioritize 'Time to First Dollar' over 'Time to Perfect UI'; users pay for solutions, not pixel-perfect margins.
Automate your database migrations; manual SQL runs are the leading cause of production downtime for solo founders.
content.next_steps: Now that you have a live deployment pipeline, spend the next 48 hours gathering feedback from three potential users and iterate on the feedback loop.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the blueprint to stop hiding behind an empty portfolio and start building your reputation through verified production code. Stop waiting for permission to build. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
